• Custom T2 Linux Build

A community-maintained build of the T2 Linux distribution.

A flexible and powerful Linux system built from source, designed for users who want control, customization, and a clean operating system experience.

Download ISO Documentation

About This Project

Custom T2 Linux Build provides customized builds based on the T2 Linux Software Construction Kit.

This project focuses on:

  • Building reproducible Linux systems
  • Custom package selections
  • Optimized configurations
  • Learning and experimenting with Linux from source

This project is not affiliated with the official T2 Linux developers. For the official project, visit: https://github.com/rxrbln/t2sde

Click here for more info

Features

🚀 Performance:

Built from source with optimized configurations for modern hardware.

🔧 Customizable:

Choose your packages, desktop environment, services, and system configuration.

🐧 Linux From Source:

Based on the T2 Linux build framework.

🔒 Clean System:

No unnecessary software. Only what you need.
